summary: Shared EOS module: cold polytrope p=κε^γ + Shum analytic p(ε)=[1+2εκ−√(1+4εκ)]/(2κ) + ideal gas; provide ε(p),p(ε),c_s²=dp/dε,d²p/dε², c_n², plus ideal-gas (∂P/∂ε)_n,(∂P/∂n)_ε,κ_ε,κ_n.
notes: GATE: EOS round-trip exact (machine) and c_s² matches dp/dε; ideal-gas derivatives match eq31-37
evidence: code/BDNKStar test/runtests.jl 189/189 pass; prim<->cons round-trip <=1e-10 (machine precision); commit 835faae

summary: Perfect-fluid conservative→primitive recovery: conformal closed form ε=−T00+√(4T00²−3T01²) plus general-EOS 1D Newton (Kastaun-style f(z)=z−r/h'(z)) with bracketing/clamping and atmosphere reset.
notes: GATE: Conformal PF recovery exact; general-EOS Newton converges to 1e-12 on physical-state battery
evidence: code/BDNKStar test/runtests.jl 189/189 pass; prim<->cons round-trip <=1e-10 (machine precision); commit 835faae

summary: Causality/stability monitor: full BDN Thm-I (a,b,d,e), reduced-hat stability, ideal-gas headline σ̂≤1/3 & τ̂ bound, Shum c0/c± and 0<q̂<ŝ, NSO radial Λ0/Λ1/Λ2 & cs²_max, plus Caballero-Yunes c_s²−c_n²≥0.
notes: GATE: Reproduce Λ0,Λ1,Λ2 & cs²_max2 for the (η=ζ=1e-2,τ_ε=15,τ_P=1.5,τ_Q=20) case; frame notebook checks return TRUE
evidence: code/BDNKStar test/runtests.jl 189/189 pass; prim<->cons round-trip <=1e-10 (machine precision); commit 835faae

summary: BDNK gradient-frozen shifted (linear-)Newton primitive-time-derivative inversion with PF fallback gated by Δ_visc; conformal closed form first, then general-EOS analytic/numeric 2×2 Jacobian J⁻¹.
notes: GATE: BDNK linear solve reproduces conformal compute_xiD/uxD; matches PF recovery in inviscid limit to 1e-10

summary: TOV background integrator (RK4 + implicit Crank-Nicholson cross-check) giving m(r),ν(r),p(r),ε(r); spline-interpolated to computational grid; exterior ν→log(1−2M/R).
notes: GATE: M(R) for n=1,κ=100,ε_c=5.5e15 g/cm³ agrees across both solvers to 1e-6; exterior e^ν matches

summary: Radial (Cowling) linear eigensolver: Chandrasekhar Sturm-Liouville W,P,Q ideal modes via matrix method, refined by frequency-domain shooting to surface BC Δp=0; then BDNK time-domain (CN, LU-once) for viscous radial modes.
equation_labels: PF Cowling pulsation ODE A2 ξ''+A1 ξ'+A0 ξ=ω² ξ
notes: GATE: First 5 ω² eigenvalues (matrix↔shooting consistent to 1e-4); BDNK Gaussian pulse evolves with 2nd-order independent residual

summary: Heat-conduction stability check: build 𝔽 (positive-definite bulk/shear) and 𝔾 (heat) operators, evaluate first-order frequency shift, verify c_s²−c_n²≥0 criterion and reproduce conditional instability on a toy c_n²>c_s² EOS.
notes: GATE: Bulk/shear unconditionally stable; sign of Im(iω^{(1)}) flips exactly when c_n²>c_s²

summary: Axial (odd-parity) linear sector: assemble the two coupled wave equations for (ψ,Z) with shear-only viscosity (ζ=0), Regge-Wheeler potential V, viscous second-sound speed c_η²=η/(τ(p+ρ)), couplings C1..C5.
notes: GATE: Coupled axial wave eqs match Redondo-Yuste eq14 / Bussières eq17-21; inviscid limit decouples to Regge-Wheeler

summary: Axial QNM eigenvalue solver: interior two-seed shooting + surface regularity BC, exterior Leaver continued-fraction vacuum, Wronskian root search with viscosity-continuation tracking of w-modes and η-mode family.
notes: GATE: Reproduce Table 2 ℓ=2 w-mode (10.4884 kHz,29.5870 µs)→(10.0898 kHz,30.8857 µs) across η_c; η-mode Im ω→0 as η_c→0; avoided crossing at η_c≳1e30

summary: Nonlinear spherically-symmetric BDNK under Cowling: HRSC finite-volume (WENO5/FDOC) + KT central flux, conserved (T^{tt},T^{ti}) evolution consuming step0.bdnk_recovery for primitive time-derivatives; regularized vtilde^r=v^r/r, atmosphere, outflow BC.
notes: GATE: Static viscous TOV stays stable to t_f=8000 M☉ within the τ_ε≲0.1 window; conformal Gaussian/shock sub-tests pass

summary: Time integration: SSP-RK3 (Shum) / Heun RK2 (conformal) with CFL Dt/Dr=0.25; IMEX treatment / numerical-dissipation floor (0.1c) for the stiff relaxation terms; characteristic-speed dissipation, hardened atmosphere.
notes: GATE: Stable long-time evolution across Dr∈[0.001,0.0032] M☉ with convergence; CFL=0.25 stable

summary: QNM extraction from the nonlinear ringdown: fit ε̃_c(t)=A e^{−t/τ}cos(ωt+φ0)+C; seed via initial-data truncation error; FFT for frequency content.
notes: GATE: Reproduce F=2.69 kHz, H1≈4.55, H2≈6.36 kHz and 1/τ∈{0.00157,0.00150,0.00215,0.00182} M☉⁻¹ across the four cases

summary: Fork A: couple BDNK hydro to 1+1D dynamical GR (harmonic or BSSN/Z4c-like), realistic/tabulated EOS, collapse; reuse s1c core, add metric evolution + apparent-horizon finder.
notes: GATE: Bjorken ODE Q_N→16 and steady-shock RH (e_R=4.4074,v_R=0.41667) reproduced; stable collapse to BH

summary: IS (Müller-Israel-Stewart) baseline + BDNK-vs-IS migration/damping contrast (Chabanov-Rezzolla): Π-as-variable cons2prim with limiters, causality-capping τ_Π reset.
notes: GATE: Migration of unstable TOV: NO BH collapse, shock stalls ~60 km at high ζ; recovered ζ within 6-35% via convergence fit

summary: Fork B: 3+1D Cowling non-radial BDNK modes; cubed-sphere angular-derivative gradient terms (Keeble-Pretorius S² formalism), RK4 + KO dissipation, polar+axial sectors.
notes: GATE: Reproduce non-radial mode frequencies; 4th-order convergence on cubed-sphere; axial η-mode recovered in 3+1D

summary: Production runs: realistic tabulated EOS, physical transport (η_c in g cm⁻¹ s⁻¹), full causality monitoring, GW extraction, convergence/error budget; reusable AthenaK-style modules.
notes: GATE: Convergent production catalog with documented error budget; causality flag clean over full runs
